---
title: "Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

## Prompt
Create a dashboard using data of your choice.

## Dashboard Overview
This dashboard presents a simple visualization to demonstrate how data can be displayed and interpreted using charts.

## Row

### Speed vs Distance
```{r}
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist,
     main = "Speed vs Distance",
     xlab = "Speed",
     ylab = "Distance")
